generator: oh-my-design parallel agent extraction (Claude Code Agent tool, no API key)

items.visual_theme: Dark-stage with a hot-pink spotlight: a #121212 video-first UI lit by signature coral-pink on every connection moment. Playful, social, animated with flying gift reactions.
items.signature_motion: Gift-send pop - spring-eased gift graphic that scales, drifts, and bursts in the reaction layer; chrome stays calm.

items.visual_theme: Editorial select-shop magazine on pure white with pure black ink — photography first, oversized margins, Pretendard-only typography, no shadows, no brand color beyond black-on-white.
antipatterns: No corporate ~합니다 ending on consumer voice
items.signature_motion: Color inversion on inverted CTA hover — #000000 ↔ #ffffff with 2px radius, no scale, no shadow.

items.visual_theme: MZ-coded mobile-first style commerce on white canvas — vibrant pink-coral reserved for commercial pressure (CTA, sale, urgency) while neutrals carry the photography-dense 4-up grid.
items.signature_motion: Heart/찜 tap: outline to filled pink with brief scale pulse on the bottom-pinned 구매하기 bar.

items.visual_theme: Warm, photography-forward marketplace feeling like a travel magazine where every page invites you to book — pure white canvas with Rausch Red accent.
items.signature_motion: Heart-icon save: outline to filled Rausch Red over motion-fast with ease-warm and small scale pulse.

items.visual_theme: Clean, enterprise-friendly platform communicating sophisticated simplicity through white canvas, deep navy text, and Swiss-precision typography with positive letter-spacing.
Ant Design's calm Daybreak Blue on clean white with a disciplined neutral-gray ladder and strictly semantic status colors. Clear, dense, dependable enterprise/fintech UI - Certainty made visual.

voice_fingerprint.register: clear reassuring procedurally-precise institution; formal in security/payment contexts

antipatterns: arbitrary gray hexes instead of black-opacity
items.signature_motion: The button wave - a faint outline expands and fades on primary-button click; calm dependable transitions everywhere else.

items.visual_theme: Clean enterprise futurism: a white high-contrast canvas with a charged electric blue signaling 'AI precision.' Card/grid IA, stat-led proof, blue->cyan gradient 'intelligence in motion.'
antipatterns: empty AI hype without a metric
items.signature_motion: Ambient blue->cyan gradient glow looping behind hero/product demos - 'active intelligence'; UI chrome quick and non-bouncy.

items.visual_theme: Controlled drama — vast pure black and near-white expanses as cinematic backdrops for products photographed as gallery sculptures. Reductive minimalism as reverence.
items.signature_motion: Pull-to-refresh: spring-physics indicator follows drag, springs back below threshold or detaches above.

items.visual_theme: Korean food delivery brand turning takeout into cultural experience through typography, humor, and a deliberately counter-industry warm mint green.
Trustworthy financial advisor on white with warm near-black text and saturated salad-green for all interaction — 2px radius dominance, dense data tables, Pretendard 700 numerals as headings.
items.signature_motion: Brand green focus/hover lightens to #10df99 — interaction makes things lighter, never darker; subtle single-layer shadow.

items.visual_theme: Iconic bili pink with a cool bili-blue accent on bright white - an unmistakably youthful ACG identity. Card-grid video feed, danmaku bullet-comments as the soul, mascots and kaomoji warmth.

voice_fingerprint.register: young warm fandom-fluent member-to-member; casual + community lexicon + kaomoji

items.signature_motion: The triple-action burst - a long-press fires like+coin+favorite together with a joyful ease-pop; danmaku scrolls as a continuous kinetic layer.

items.visual_theme: Automotive engineering made visual — precision, performance, and German industrial confidence with cinematic dark/light rhythm and angular zero-radius geometry.
C2C marketplace red — single red (#d80c18, one job: primary CTA), specialty token ladders (care=amber, safe=indigo) literally encoding product taxonomy, zero box-shadow.
items.signature_motion: Card thumbnail crossfade; like-heart fill animation; sold-out diagonal stripe overlay.

items.visual_theme: Monochromatic restraint — grayscale world where boldness comes from confidence of black text on white space, not color. Architectural Cal Sans headlines.
antipatterns: No CSS borders when shadows work

items.visual_theme: Single-CTA orange (#FF3D00, 4× in 3000-element scan) — hard-square 0px chrome on 92% of elements, 150% line-height uniform across 35 typography slots, 145 :root vanilla-extract _11bicz7* vars.
items.signature_motion: Slot booking modal slide, calendar date-pick spring.

items.visual_theme: Global B2B SaaS chat — open-source Bezier DS (MIT) with Inter + Noto KR/JP stacks, marketing-vs-product type cliff (marketing 48-64px / product 36px max).
items.signature_motion: Bubble pop-in spring; typing-indicator 3-dot 1.2s loop; unread badge bounce on increment.

items.visual_theme: A bright motivational class storefront on white where an energetic orange brand-spark pairs with a grounded near-black action button over editorial creator-led thumbnails.

body text below 16px on learning surfaces
items.signature_motion: Card hover lift; a green check spring-pop with progress-bar fill on lesson completion.

items.visual_theme: EdTech classroom collab — Webflow class-driven (no :root vars), 14px Korean body density at WCAG floor, brand red == destructive (downstream split needed).
items.signature_motion: Post-reply expand 250ms; reaction emoji pop spring; threaded indent slide-in.

items.visual_theme: Literary salon reimagined as product page — warm, unhurried, quietly intellectual on parchment canvas evoking premium paper rather than digital surface.
items.signature_motion: Typewriter streaming: model output appears character by character at actual decoding timing — never faked or replayed.

items.visual_theme: Warm, playful celebration of color treating B2B data enrichment like a craft — cream backgrounds, named swatch palette, hand-made paper texture.
High-performance cockpit in acid yellow-green on obsidian black — terminal-grade aesthetic screaming speed through visual mass and high-contrast neon.
Polished enterprise command deck — confident, clean, designed to make AI feel like serious infrastructure. Bright white canvas with 22px signature card radius.
Clean, trustworthy crypto platform; blue-and-white binary palette with alternating dark and light sections, proprietary Coinbase fonts.
Nocturnal developer command center; pitch-black canvas with cyan and cobalt bioluminescent glows and barely-visible white-border containment.

A warm, well-lit home kitchen: friendly orange primary popping against a signature cream off-white background, photo-forward recipe tiles, soft 8px corners - homey and unintimidating, never chef-elite.

voice_fingerprint.register: warm, encouraging, unpretentious polite Japanese; peer-to-peer

items.signature_motion: Calm standard motion with one reserved soft overshoot on the save heart tap; appetizing image fade-ins.

items.visual_theme: Hyper-efficient Korean discount warehouse: clean white canvas, near-black text, and the warm rocket-exhaust Coupang Red carrying CTAs, price emphasis, and the 로켓배송 badge. Information-dense product grids fit 4-5 cards per row with sharp 0-4px corners and tabular price stacks.
items.signature_motion: Add-to-cart fly performs a brief 8% scaled translate of the thumbnail toward the cart icon with a +1 badge increment — confirms without blocking.

items.visual_theme: Warm minimalism meets code-editor elegance; cream canvas with warm near-black text, three-font system, oklab borders, full-pill CTAs.
items.signature_motion: Hover text shifts to warm crimson #cf2d56; shadows transition over 200ms ease for elevation changes.

items.visual_theme: Real-estate listing platform — brand pink #FF3478 restricted to wordmark (3.4:1 fails AA body), 8-hue × 10-step ladder + -rgb variants (140 :root vars), Pretendard Variable 100%, zero box-shadow 100%, action blue #326CF9.
items.signature_motion: Map pin cluster zoom, listing card flip.

items.visual_theme: Material Design adapted for East-Asian forum culture; deep teal-navy header framing light-gray content with white post cards.
items.signature_motion: Material easing cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) with .15s hover/press and .3s page transitions.

items.visual_theme: Monochrome black/white/silver chrome with a single sky-blue accent; full-bleed product photography and flight footage carry every page. Premium-industrial minimalism where the product is the only ornament.

voice_fingerprint.register: confident terse engineer, capability-led, never gushing

antipatterns: marketing hype the spec sheet can't substantiate
items.signature_motion: Slow gravity-free product reveals - hero footage fades from black, 360 spins with smooth mechanical easing, never overshoot.

items.visual_theme: Restrained elegance on near-white canvas; ethereal light-weight Waldenburg display, multi-layered sub-0.1 opacity shadows, warm stone pill CTAs.
Luminous airy developer platform; cool-tinted off-white canvas with strictly monochromatic chrome and pill-shaped geometry throughout.

Rich-color signature (yellow/orange/red/pink/blue/green Material ramps) vs single-mint Inflearn / institutional-blue Classum. Commerce-red #fc1c49 doubles as primary + sale-flag + inline-validation-error. Inverted GNB density (12px/600 secondary-compact + 16px/400 primary). Card geometry 4px 4px 0 0 + rank badge 4px 0 corner-only. 103 :root vars in --fds-color-*/--c-primary-*/--fds-semantic-* namespaces.
items.signature_motion: Category tab slide, course card hover scale.

items.visual_theme: Digital editorial with chiaroscuro rhythm; alternating black cinematic and white editorial panels, Ferrari Red used surgically as accent.
Black-and-white interface chrome with vibrant multi-color hero gradients; variable font with unusual weight stops and pill-and-circle geometry.

voice_fingerprint.sentence_length: short and aspirational in marketing; longer colloquial in blog
voice_fingerprint.metaphor_density: low in chrome; moderate in editorial blog titles
voice_fingerprint.vocabulary_register: designer jargon assumed without gloss (frame, component, auto-layout)

items.signature_motion: Multiplayer cursor presence updates at raw frame rate with no easing; chrome uses cubic-bezier only, no spring or bounce.

items.visual_theme: HR SaaS Stitches/CSS-in-JS stack — 0 namespaced :root tokens (tokens normalized from computed-style), Toss-adjacent KR voice tone, monochrome dashboard chrome.

items.signature_motion: Banner carousel auto-rotate, sprite-based icon animation.

items.visual_theme: Monochrome-industrial: a black matte-machine canvas with electric-blue and cyan voltage accents used like current through a circuit. Graphik-set, photography-led, premium and engineered.

heavy chrome over the white canvas
items.signature_motion: Add-to-itinerary spring-pop and overshooting map-pin drops.

items.visual_theme: Warm monochrome creator-crowdfunding magazine — pure black type on white so project art is the color, with a signature coral on the 후원하기 CTA and funding-progress bar. Full-pill buttons keep it human.
items.signature_motion: Coral funding-bar fills 0→current% with a confident ease-out as the number counts up.

items.visual_theme: CJ ENM OTT streaming — dark canvas, brand red #FF153C primary CTA, six-category --color-cate-* taxonomy, mobile-first poster card grid, 114 :root CSS custom properties.
items.signature_motion: Hero auto-play 5s loop, card hover scale, episode list slide.

items.visual_theme: Stark black-and-white duality with pill-shaped controls and warm human illustrations.
Dense crypto exchange — KR up=red/down=blue inverted from US, navy chrome, 28px speed-fill tags, legacy Dotum/돋움 fallback chain unpruned.
items.signature_motion: Tick-by-tick price flash (200ms red/blue), candle-chart redraw on resize, no easing on numeric updates.

items.visual_theme: AI corporate identity — Espeak proprietary face on hero, Solar lime accent #D2FF95 single-use, industry-rotating hero (font-family shifts not color/weight), 74 :root vars, brand resource center with logo/symbol only (no token tables).
items.signature_motion: Hero industry-text rotate, font-family swap not color.

items.visual_theme: Gallery-white canvas with near-black text and shadow-as-border craft; minimalism as engineering principle.
items.signature_motion: Shadow-border hover lift; card shadow intensifies without translation.

items.visual_theme: Carbon-black command terminal pulsing with emerald signal green; warm-neutral borders soften the dark.
items.signature_motion: Emerald drop-shadow glow pulses 2px to 8px on the bolt logo.

items.visual_theme: Crowdfunding mint — saturated #00c4c4 CTAs with 2.7:1 contrast trade-off, single source-of-truth 936KB CSS bundle, `-하기` gerund + `~해요` polite-casual voice patterns.
items.signature_motion: Funding-progress bar fill on viewport entry; 'XX%' counter rollup over 800ms.

items.visual_theme: Career marketplace as growth mentor — single decisive cobalt #0066FF for interaction only on a warm-white canvas, custom Wanted Sans + Pretendard, 12px-radius JobCard with salary + 합격보상금 visible by structural rule.
antipatterns: No 대박 채용/핫한 회사/놓치지 마세요 urgency marketing
No competitive/negotiable in lieu of a range
items.signature_motion: JobCard hover: 12px-radius lift with bookmark icon outline→filled transition; brand blue used only on interactive states.

items.visual_theme: Warm earthy near-black canvas with parchment text and nature photography; terminal as lifestyle brand.
A near-pure-black cinema-lobby canvas where suppressed gray-on-black chrome lets poster art glow, lit by a single hot magenta-pink interactive accent.
antipatterns: brighter marketing pink #FF0558 as a UI fill
brightening the black canvas toward gray
items.signature_motion: Poster scales 1.0->1.04 with a bottom gradient fade-in; a pink star-fill pop on rating.

items.visual_theme: A blue tide into the evening — deep midnight-blue canvas (not pure black) with a bright brand blue point color, poster art as the light source. Calmer and bluer than the louder red OTT incumbents.
antipatterns: second saturated interactive hue vs blue
warm red beyond the LIVE indicator
items.signature_motion: Poster hover scale 1.05 with continue-watching progress glowing brand blue; LIVE red dot pulses gently.

items.visual_theme: Absolute monochrome concept-store gallery — black type and chrome on white, sharp 0px corners, a single hot orange-red flashing only on sale percentages. Premium through subtraction; the photograph is the only color.
items.signature_motion: Product card image dims to 92% on press without scaling — gallery grid, never elastic.

items.visual_theme: Bright white canvas with Webflow blue and rich secondary palette; precise variable-font confidence.
items.signature_motion: translate(6px) hover slide on buttons.

items.visual_theme: Off-white canvas with billboard-bold black headlines and lime-green pill CTAs; nature-inspired fintech.
items.signature_motion: scale(1.05) hover and scale(0.95) active button compression.

items.visual_theme: Brutalist dark canvas with monospace at extreme display scale; depth via opacity and contrast only.
items.signature_motion: Hover dims links to 0.5 opacity instead of brightening.

items.visual_theme: A jealously-guarded Torch Red on clinical white, with a two-column variable-height masonry waterfall of note cards. The content is the interface; soft rounded shapes whisper aspiration, never shout discount.

voice_fingerprint.register: warm peer-level friend, enthusiastic but credible; casual + native lexicon

antipatterns: red sprayed across chrome (scarcity is the signal)
formal register in casual social contexts
items.signature_motion: The like-heart pop - outline heart fills with a 1->1.3->1 scale overshoot; the only spring in the product.

items.visual_theme: Korean weekend getaway: clean white canvas with warm near-black headings and the unmistakable Yanolja Orange — a coral-red-orange sunset hue calibrated to feel like a vacation poster. Image-dominant lodging cards with prominent discount percentages, 8px standard radius, and a discount-first information hierarchy.
items.signature_motion: Discount-badge first-paint scales 0.85 → 1.0 with a soft spring so the coral percentage reads before the price.

items.visual_theme: Hospitality-grade Korean lodging booking surface: clean white canvas with a single confident Yeogiotte Blue accent and photography-as-brand listing cards. Cleaner and quieter than competing super-apps, with three-tier radii (8px buttons / 12px cards / 100px filter pills) and badge-driven promo grammar.
items.signature_motion: Filter-chip selection fills #1D8BFF with no geometry change over motion-fast/ease-standard — fast and committed, never bouncy.

items.visual_theme: Appetite plus joy — a hot red-pink forward-motion accent over a bright white canvas where food photography supplies the craving. Soft rounded cards make the path from hungry to ordered fast and delightful.
antipatterns: extra steps in the order path
items.signature_motion: Cart badge increments with a 1.15 scale-pop in red; sticky bottom cart bar slides up when the cart gains an item.

items.visual_theme: Cream paper canvas with reddish-warm near-black text and signature orange; warm approachable automation.
items.signature_motion: Inset orange underline marks active tabs; sand underline previews hover.

items.visual_theme: Near-monochrome real-estate map tool — near-black #171719 type at weight 400, functional blue #0066ff for action only, brand orange reserved for wordmark, disabled-by-transparency neutrals so the map carries the surface.
antipatterns: No 지금 바로!/놓치지 마세요!/최저가 보장 urgency
No exclamation marks on routine CTAs
No orange on functional UI (brand-mark only)
items.signature_motion: Map-floating chrome: 8/10px-radius chips fade to rgba(55,56,60,0.16) on disabled; bookmark toggle is 50% circular outline→filled.

items.visual_theme: Mobile-as-canvas fashion playground locked to 600px max-width even on desktop — off-white #f5f6f6 surface, ZIGZAG brand pink #fa6ee3 for wordmark + favorites, interactive pink #f55dd6 for CTAs, coral #fb4333 for alerts.
antipatterns: No desktop multi-column reflow (mobile centred is the brand)
items.signature_motion: 찜 heart: outline → filled brand pink with brief pulse; primary CTA uses pink-400 fill, darkening to pink-450/550 on hover/press.
